examples: Over 600 Hazel Dormice have been released into 12 counties by PTES.
A family of four Glis dormice were found in the ticket machine on the platform of a little train station in Aylesbury in Buckinghamshire after complaints it had stopped working.
And if one "manages to do it twice", does it mean the dormice choose to cross the road only once, or does it actually mean that none of them survive a second attempt at crossing the road?
There was a lot of talk about dormice, but they're not actually on Kiln Meadow.
Dormice have been recorded at Alton Water reservoir near Ipswich for the first time.
